title: ocotea monteverdensis
intro: Ocotea monteverdensis, also known as Costa Rican Sandalo or Sandalwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Central America, particularly in Costa Rica. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sandalwood oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea monteverdensis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as its potential to improve skin health and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy practices.
